notes: SHIP v1.14.218 — 3D RACK VIEW (three.js r128, per HANDOFF-3d-rack-view.md, base .217). Adds an OPT-IN three.js 3D view to the rack-detail RACK ELEVATION panel ONLY. FLAT stays the instant, WebGL-free default (existing rackElevation_buildHtml, untouched); a FLAT|3D segmented toggle lazy-loads three.js on first 3D tap and mounts a bounded WebGL scene. NOT on the floor map or any list. OWNER STEP fulfilled autonomously: vendored genuine three.min.js r128 (MIT, 603445 bytes, sha256 9274bbcec8d96168626c732b5d31c775aa8cfb7eaa0599bec0c175908a2c1ce2, valid JS, UMD → window.THREE) at vendor/three.min.js (app vendor/ convention, like vendor/zxing.min.js — DEVIATION from spec's 'repo root'). EDITS (all in dct-ios.html + sw.js): (1) new 3D module before rackElevation_buildHtml: reh3d_prefOn/Set (sessionStorage phantom_rackview_3d, DEFAULT FLAT so a cold-aisle session never auto-spins a GPU), reh3d_webglOK (WebGL support probe), reh3d_restore (post-paint session-pref restore), reh3d_setMode (FLAT|3D toggle handler + haptic), rackElevation_ensure3D (lazy loadScript('./vendor/three.min.js') → render, .catch → reh3d_fail), reh3d_fail (fall back to FLAT + warn toast, never blank), rackElevation_render3D (the scene). (2) panel edit @29997 in deploy_showRackDetail: redesign_isOn()-gated — under redesign, .rack-hybrid-canvas gets a FLAT|3D toggle header + #rehFlatWrap.reh-flat-wrap (display:contents, wraps the UNCHANGED rackElevation_buildHtml(rack)) + #reh3dMount; under legacy, the ORIGINAL line verbatim (byte-identical). setTimeout hook also calls reh3d_restore(rack). (3) CSS: 8 body.rd-scoped .reh-3d-* / .reh-flat-wrap rules; display:contents keeps FLAT byte-identical, .is-3d swaps flat↔3D. (4) sw.js: 'vendor/three.min.js' added to PRECACHE_URLS (offline-first) + CACHE_VERSION .217->.218. SCENE (mirrors MOCKUP-rack-threejs.html, bounded to mountEl, driven by REAL data): Scene+FogExp2, PerspectiveCamera(42), WebGLRenderer(alpha, pixelRatio<=2, sized to mountEl NOT window), ambient+key+rim lights, frame posts/rails (BoxGeometry), one tray mesh per rack.slots[] device — y from ((uStart+uEnd)/2-0.5)*uH over rack.totalU (1-based, U1=bottom), height (uEnd-uStart+1)*uH, COLOR from TYPE_COLORS[dev.type].bar (same map as FLAT legend, NOT rackTemplate_keyFor), mesh.userData.dev = the literal slot; ground disc; manual orbit (rack group rotates, camera fixed at (0,4.5,dist)) via mouse (down on canvas, move/up on window) + single-touch, PINCH-zoom (two-finger) + wheel zoom, idle auto-spin (skipped under prefers-reduced-motion); TAP raycast (11px gloved tap-vs-drag threshold) → nearest tray → openRmDevice(dev) after setting window._rmConnHit={id:rack.id} for cab context. TEARDOWN (load-bearing — iOS GL context ceiling): cancelAnimationFrame, remove ALL listeners, ResizeObserver.disconnect, dispose geometries+materials, renderer.dispose()+forceContextLoss(), remove canvas; visibilitychange pauses the RAF; module-global _reh3dActive bounds live contexts to 1 (a new open or toggle-to-FLAT disposes the prior). STATUS: trays render SOLID now (Part A overlay not shipped); trayMaterial(dev,status) is the single hook where racked/ghost-amber/fault materials layer in later — geometry is created before material so the future EdgesGeometry outline is additive. All 16 r128 APIs verified present (manual orbit BECAUSE OrbitControls is not in r128 core). Gates: node --check sw.js + inline HTML blocks · CSS braces balanced · CRLF preserved · vendor/three.min.js present+valid · three-stamp lockstep .217->.218. ROLLBACK: git revert — additive (1 module, 1 gated panel branch, 8 CSS rules, 1 precache entry); FLAT is the untouched original render so revert leaves the working surface exactly as-is; optionally remove vendor/three.min.js. DEVICE-VERIFY (hard stop): remove+re-add PWA, let new SW activate (precaches three.min.js), confirm app reads v1.14.218, then: (1) Floor map → tap a rack tile → rack page opens on FLAT (instant, no three.js fetch — check Network); (2) tap 3D → three.js loads once, rack renders in 3D; drag orbits, two-finger pinch zooms, idle auto-spins; (3) tap a tray → its device sheet (openRmDevice) opens for the correct device; (4) MINI ruler still shows beside 3D (untouched .rack-hybrid-minimap column); (5) airplane mode + reload + open rack + tap 3D → still works (precached); (6) toggle back to FLAT / leave the page → GPU loop stops (no background render — the visibilitychange + teardown path); (7) 3D choice is remembered within the session, resets to FLAT on a fresh session; (8) ?legacy=1 → NO toggle, NO 3D, page byte-identical; (9) a device without WebGL → tapping 3D shows the warn toast + stays FLAT (never blank). If 3D is blank/soft → mount had 0 size at first paint (deferred-rAF guard) or three.min.js 404 (precache/CACHE_VERSION bump didn't take).
